name: DualTrackCombiner
description: Combines converged extracted state with witness-filtered partial-denoising candidates. The half-baked-as-feature mechanism.
code:
_dtc{{_id}}_x = np.concatenate([{{latent}}.reshape(-1), {{step_embed}}.reshape(-1)], axis=0).reshape(1, -1)
_dtc{{_id}}_d = _dtc{{_id}}_x.shape[-1]
_dtc{{_id}}_mean = np.mean(_dtc{{_id}}_x, axis=-1, keepdims=True)
_dtc{{_id}}_var = np.var(_dtc{{_id}}_x, axis=-1, keepdims=True)
_dtc{{_id}}_normed = (_dtc{{_id}}_x - _dtc{{_id}}_mean) / np.sqrt(_dtc{{_id}}_var + {{eps}})
_dtc{{_id}}_W = np.random.randn(1, _dtc{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * 0.02
_dtc{{_id}}_conf = 1.0 / (1.0 + np.exp(-np.dot(_dtc{{_id}}_normed, _dtc{{_id}}_W.T)))
_dtc{{_id}}_alpha = float(_dtc{{_id}}_conf.ravel()[0])
{{combined}} = _dtc{{_id}}_alpha * {{converged}} + (1.0 - _dtc{{_id}}_alpha) * {{partial}}
